description_long: This is a robust, cylindrical fire hydrant painted in a weathered green color, with a domed top and a thick, hexagonal base. The hydrant features two prominent side outlets and a central vertical body, all showing signs of surface wear and chipping, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements. The outlets are capped and flush with the main body, lacking visible hose threads or chains. The top of the hydrant is rounded and slightly larger in diameter than the body, with a flat ring separating the dome from the outlets. The base is wide and stable, designed to anchor the hydrant securely to the ground. No manufacturer markings, chains, or operating nuts are visible, giving the hydrant a simple, utilitarian appearance.
description: A green, weathered fire hydrant with a domed top, two capped side outlets, and a thick hexagonal base. The surface shows signs of outdoor wear and lacks visible markings or chains.
description_view_0: Front view showing both side outlets and the domed top, with the base and weathered green paint clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one capped outlet protruding from the cylindrical body, with the dome and base in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying both side outlets and the dome, with no additional features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other capped outlet, with the dome and base in profile, mirroring view 1.
